$comment: Intended required status checks for branch protection on main. The ci-health-weekly workflow compares this manifest against actual branch protection and flags drift. Update this file (with review) before changing branch protection settings.
advisoryChecks: Mobile UX contract and banned patterns

notes: A required check with >5% flake rate must be repaired or demoted to advisory.
Lighthouse is intentionally advisory on PRs and enforced on main pushes.
Merge queue should be enforced on main so bypass-merges are unavailable.
